The '''Second Mission to Byss''' was carried out by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaden Korr]] for the [[New Jedi Order]].

==Background==
Due to the fact that [[Rosh Penin]] never completed [[Mission to Byss (Rosh Penin)|his investigation]] of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] prior to his seduction to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], Korr was sent to determine if [[Tavion Axmis]] had already used the [[Scepter of Ragnos]] to absorb the planet's [[The Force/Legends|Force]] energy. Katarn also decided to come, so that Korr himself would not be at risk of being captured.

==The mission==
After arriving at Byss, Korr and Katarn could not detect any dark side presence, confirming that Tavion Axmis had already claimed the energy she needed. Before they could leave the system however, the ''[[Raven's Claw]]'' was caught in the [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught'']]. Katarn and Korr split up once their ship was brought onboard. Katarn went to trigger the ship's self-destruct mechanism while Korr went to deactivate the tractor beam.

Eventually, Korr was able to disable the tractor beam, battling [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[hazard stormtrooper]]s along the way. However, the Imperials had already sent out a distress signal and before long, [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] were attacking the ''Dreadnaught''. Korr took control of the ''Dreadnaught''{{'s}} [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons and destroyed the TIEs. After he rejoined Katarn in the hangar and escaped in the ''Raven's Claw'', the ''Dreadnaught'' was destroyed, the explosion destroying a number of surviving TIEs that were pursuing the ''Raven's Claw''.

==Behind the scenes==
When the player gets back to the hangar bay at the end of the mission, [[Kyle Katarn]] is seen using his famous [[Bryar pistol/Legends|Bryar pistol]] that appears in [[Star Wars: Dark Forces|''Dark Forces I'']], ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight|II]]'', [[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith|''Mysteries of the Sith'']], and [[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast|''Jedi Outcast'']].
